Command →
API → Service
→ Commander
→ Transport → MCU

Sensor → Pack
→ Frame → Parse
→ EventBus

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(126, 34, 206) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
my_app.py
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
from mara_host import Robot
async with Robot('/dev/tty') as robot:
await robot.arm()
await robot.activate()
# High-rate streaming (binary)
await robot.motion.set_velocity(
vx=0.5, omega=0.0
)
await robot.motion.stop()

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(30, 64, 175) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
motion_service.py
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
class MotionService:
async def set_velocity(
self, vx, omega, binary=True
):
await self.client.send_stream(
'CMD_SET_VEL',
{'vx': vx, 'omega': omega},
binary=binary
)
